revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Amenoshirahano shrine]][[ja:天志良波神社]] {{神社 |名称 = 天志良波神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Amenoshirahano shrine - ibaraki - yellow torii - 2019-4-29.jpg|225px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[茨城県]][[常陸太田市]]白羽町1670 | 緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 34|緯度秒 = 20 | 経度度 = 140|経度分 = 33|経度秒 = 3 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[長白羽神|天白羽命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = [[4月10日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Ibaraki |ラベル位置=left }} '''Amenoshirahano Shrine''' (天志良波神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Hitachiōta, Ibaraki|en|Hitachiōta, Ibaraki|qid=Q838663|lt=Hitachiota, Ibaraki|1=Hitachiōta, Ibaraki}} in {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, Japan. It is an {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}-listed shrine with the former shrine Rank of {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Nagashirahano no Kami|ja|長白羽神|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagashirahano no Kami|qq=}}, also known as Amenoshirahano no Mikoto. The annual festival is held on {{ill|April 10th|en|4月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 10th|qq=}}. == History == The exact time of establishment is unknown. The shrine was elevated to Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (従五位下) in the 8th year of the Jōgan era (866) and later promoted to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (従五位上) in the 16th year of the same era (874). In the 13th year of the Tenbun era (1544), the shrine's buildings were repaired under the patronage of {{ill|Satake Yoshitoku|ja|佐竹義篤 (十六代当主)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Yoshitoku|qq=}}. During the 15th year of the Tenpō era (1844), the shrine was designated as the guardian shrine for five nearby villages, including Shiraha, under the sponsorship of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}}. == Notes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == {{commons cat|Amenoshirahano shrine|天志良波神社|qq=}} * {{Cite book|和書|author=Nakamura Hiroshi|chapter=Amenoshirahano Shrine|title=Ibaraki Prefecture Encyclopedia|publisher=Ibaraki Shimbunsha|year=1981|ref=harv|qq=}} {{Shinto horizontal|qq=}} {{List of shrines in Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}} {{Shinto-stub|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|天志良波神社|version=76800029|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:天志良波神社]] {{Commons category|Amenoshirahano shrine}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] '''Ame-no-Shirahano Shrine (Q11442597)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Kuji District, Ibaraki|en|Kuji District, Ibaraki|ja|久慈郡|ceb|Kuji-gun|es|Distrito de Kuji (Ibaraki)|fr|District de Kuji|id|Distrik Kuji, Ibaraki|it|Distretto di Kuji|ko|구지군|pl|Powiat Kuji|th|อำเภอคูจิ|uk|Повіт Кудзі|vi|Kuji, Ibaraki|zh|久慈郡|lt=Kuji district|qid=Q1075212|1=Kuji District, Ibaraki}} || {{ill|Ame-no-Shirahano Shrine|lt=Ameno Shirahano Shrine|ja|天志良波神社|commons|Category:Amenoshirahano shrine|qid=Q11442597|1=Ame-no-Shirahano Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} || — || — || {{coord|36.572451|140.550810|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181761 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11442597}} [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province]]==Notes== [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province]] [[Category:Architecture of Hitachiōta City]] [[Category:Municipal History of Hitachiota]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Ibaraki Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ibaraki Prefecture]]
